falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this level would contradict the bottom pattern and indicate continued bearish momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Volatility Index rises above 30 and remains above 30 for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained elevated volatility would indicate market panic and a failure of the pattern's implied stability, disproving the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of the Nasdaq Composite crosses below the 50-day moving average (death cross) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical bearish signal would directly contradict the pattern's implied bullish reversal, falsifying the current call.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
